info.description: curl is a command line tool and library for transferring data with URLs.

parameters.name: Output
parameters.description: Write to file instead of stdout.

parameters.name: Fail
parameters.description: Fail fast with no output on HTTP errors.

parameters.name: Get
parameters.description: Put the post data in the URL and use GET.

parameters.name: Retry
parameters.description: Retry request if transient problems occur.

parameters.name: Remote Name
parameters.description: Write output to file named as remote file.

parameters.name: Abstract Unix Socket
parameters.description: Connect via abstract Unix domain socket.

parameters.name: Alt-Svc
parameters.description: Enable alt-svc with this cache file.

parameters.name: Append
parameters.description: Append to target file when uploading.

parameters.name: CA Native
parameters.description: Load CA certs from the OS.

parameters.name: Cacert
parameters.description: CA certificate to verify peer against.

parameters.name: Capath
parameters.description: CA directory to verify peer against.

parameters.name: Connect To
parameters.description: Connect to host2 instead of host1.

parameters.name: Cookie
parameters.description: Send cookies from string/load from file.

parameters.name: CRLF
parameters.description: Convert LF to CRLF in upload.

parameters.name: Curves
parameters.description: (EC) TLS key exchange algorithms to request.

parameters.name: DNS Interface
parameters.description: Interface to use for DNS requests.

parameters.name: DNS IPv4 Address
parameters.description: IPv4 address to use for DNS requests.

parameters.name: DNS IPv6 Address
parameters.description: IPv6 address to use for DNS requests.

parameters.name: DoH Cert Status
parameters.description: Verify DoH server cert status OCSP-staple.

parameters.name: Dump CA Embed
parameters.description: Write the embedded CA bundle to standard output.

parameters.name: EGD File
parameters.description: EGD socket path for random data.

parameters.name: ETag Save
parameters.description: Parse incoming ETag and save to a file.

parameters.name: Fail With Body
parameters.description: Fail on HTTP errors but save the body.

parameters.name: FTP Create Dirs
parameters.description: Create the remote dirs if not present.

parameters.name: FTP Skip Passive IP
parameters.description: Skip the IP address for PASV.

parameters.name: FTP SSL Control
parameters.description: Require TLS for login, clear for transfer.

parameters.name: HAProxy Protocol
parameters.description: Send HAProxy PROXY protocol v1 header.

parameters.name: Host Pubkey MD5
parameters.description: Acceptable MD5 hash of host public key.

parameters.name: Host Pubkey SHA256
parameters.description: Acceptable SHA256 hash of host public key.

parameters.name: HSTS
parameters.description: Enable HSTS with this cache file.

parameters.name: Ignore Content Length
parameters.description: Ignore the size of the remote resource.

parameters.name: IP TOS
parameters.description: Set IP Type of Service or Traffic Class.

parameters.name: Junk Session Cookies
parameters.description: Ignore session cookies read from file.

parameters.name: Libcurl
parameters.description: Generate libcurl code for this command line.

parameters.name: Local Port
parameters.description: Use a local port number within RANGE.

parameters.name: Location Trusted
parameters.description: As --location, but send secrets to other hosts.

parameters.name: Mail Auth
parameters.description: Originator address of the original email.

parameters.name: Mail RCPT Allow Fails
parameters.description: Allow RCPT TO command to fail.

parameters.name: Metalink
parameters.description: Process given URLs as metalink XML file.

parameters.name: Netrc
parameters.description: Must read .netrc for username and password.

parameters.name: Next
parameters.description: Make next URL use separate options.

parameters.name: No Buffer
parameters.description: Disable buffering of the output stream.

parameters.name: No Clobber
parameters.description: Do not overwrite files that already exist.

parameters.name: No Keepalive
parameters.description: Disable TCP keepalive on the connection.

parameters.name: No Progress Meter
parameters.description: Do not show the progress meter.

parameters.name: Noproxy
parameters.description: List of hosts which do not use proxy.

parameters.name: Output Null
parameters.description: Discard response data into the void.

parameters.name: Parallel Max Host
parameters.description: Maximum connections to a single host.

parameters.name: Path As Is
parameters.description: Do not squash .. sequences in URL path.

parameters.name: Pinnedpubkey
parameters.description: Public key to verify peer against.

parameters.name: Post 301
parameters.description: Do not switch to GET after a 301 redirect.

parameters.name: Post 302
parameters.description: Do not switch to GET after a 302 redirect.

parameters.name: Post 303
parameters.description: Do not switch to GET after a 303 redirect.

parameters.name: Progress Bar
parameters.description: Display transfer progress as a bar.

parameters.name: Proto Default
parameters.description: Use PROTOCOL for any URL missing a scheme.

parameters.name: Proxy basic
parameters.description: Use Basic authentication on the proxy.

parameters.name: Proxy CA Native
parameters.description: Load CA certs from the OS to verify proxy.

parameters.name: Proxy CA Cert
parameters.description: CA certificates to verify proxy against.

parameters.name: Proxy CA Path
parameters.description: CA directory to verify proxy against.

parameters.name: Proxy Cert Type
parameters.description: Client certificate type for HTTPS proxy.

parameters.name: Proxy Ciphers
parameters.description: TLS 1.2 (1.1, 1.0) ciphers to use for proxy.

parameters.name: Proxy CRL File
parameters.description: Set a CRL list for proxy.

parameters.name: Proxy Key Type
parameters.description: Private key file type for proxy.

parameters.name: Proxy Negotiate
parameters.description: HTTP Negotiate (SPNEGO) auth with the proxy.

parameters.name: Proxy Password
parameters.description: Passphrase for private key for HTTPS proxy.

parameters.name: Proxy Pinned Public Key
parameters.description: FILE/HASHES public key to verify proxy with.

parameters.name: Proxy SSL Allow BEAST
parameters.description: Allow this security flaw for HTTPS proxy.

parameters.name: Proxy TLS Auth Type
parameters.description: TLS authentication type for HTTPS proxy.

parameters.name: Proxy 1.0
parameters.description: Use HTTP/1.0 proxy on given port.

parameters.name: Quote
parameters.description: Send command(s) to server before transfer.

parameters.name: Random File
parameters.description: File for reading random data from.

parameters.name: Range
parameters.description: Retrieve only the bytes within RANGE.

parameters.name: Raw
parameters.description: Do HTTP raw; no transfer decoding.

parameters.name: Remote Name All
parameters.description: Use the remote filename for all URLs.

parameters.name: Remote Time
parameters.description: Set remote file's time on local output.

parameters.name: Request Target
parameters.description: Specify the target for this request.

parameters.name: Show Error
parameters.description: Show error even when -s is used.

parameters.name: Skip Existing
parameters.description: Skip download if local file already exists.

parameters.name: SOCKS4
parameters.description: SOCKS4 proxy on given host + port.

parameters.name: SOCKS4a
parameters.description: SOCKS4a proxy on given host + port.

parameters.name: SOCKS5
parameters.description: SOCKS5 proxy on given host + port.

parameters.name: SOCKS5 GSSAPI
parameters.description: Enable GSS-API auth for SOCKS5 proxies.

parameters.name: SOCKS5 GSSAPI Service
parameters.description: SOCKS5 proxy service name for GSS-API.

parameters.name: SOCKS5 Hostname
parameters.description: SOCKS5 proxy, pass hostname to proxy.

parameters.name: SSL Allow BEAST
parameters.description: Allow security flaw to improve interop.

parameters.name: SSL Revoke Best Effort
parameters.description: Ignore missing cert CRL dist points.

parameters.name: SSL Sessions
parameters.description: Load/save SSL session tickets from/to this file.

parameters.name: Styled Output
parameters.description: Enable styled output for HTTP headers.

parameters.name: TFTP No Options
parameters.description: Do not send any TFTP options.

parameters.name: Time Condition
parameters.description: Transfer based on a time condition.

parameters.name: TLS Early Data
parameters.description: Allow use of TLSv1.3 early data (0RTT).

parameters.name: Trace
parameters.description: Write a debug trace to FILE.

parameters.name: Trace Config
parameters.description: Details to log in trace/verbose output.

parameters.name: Trace IDs
parameters.description: Transfer + connection ids in verbose output.

parameters.name: Trace Time
parameters.description: Add time stamps to trace/verbose output.

parameters.name: Unix Socket
parameters.description: Connect through this Unix domain socket.

parameters.name: Xattr
parameters.description: Store metadata in extended file attributes.
